texto: People need people and the happiest people aresurrounded with friendly flesh.If you have ten kids they'll be so sweet --ten really sweet kids! Have twelve!What if there were 48 pro baseball teams,you could see a damn lot more games!And in this fashion we get awayfrom tragedy. Because tragedy comes when someone gets too special.
explicacao: Citação de Mark Halliday sobre temas ligados a amizade. “People need people and the happiest people aresurrounded with friendly flesh.If you have ten kids…” articula amizade, poem, population em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e population.
